roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR  APPEARING/3000ADM/X:ADMITS VIOLATION #2/3000REIN/PAJ: 120 DAYS/X: WITH TIME LOST/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 42 DAYS,/4019HALF/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED/  /SAORD/SA1:CORETTA STEWART; 9-4-68; F; B/SAORD3/SA2: 25 DUKES COURT, SAN FRANCISCO, 94124/X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT ON PAROLE 3056 PETITION/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPERING VIA ZOOM,/CTORD: PAROLE ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/  /PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS,/NB/X: TIME IS NOT WAIVED FOR PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING,/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAMPURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:01-04-22/S/CTORD: BEFORE NEXT CALLINGOF THIS CASE, PAROLE SHALL PROVIDE TO DEFENSE COUNSEL RECORDS-REPORT RE DEFENDANT'S MENTAL HEALTH DIAGNOSIS, DEFENDANT'S MENTAL HEALTH TREATMENT NEEDSAND PAROLE'S TREATMENT PLAN/CONTD: PAROLE PREHEARING CONFERENCE, POSSIBLEPRC REFERRAL AND RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT/
